663.reason: [For error type 'i' (missing semicolon), the error line should be the line of the last non-terminal before the expected semicolon, not the current token position. The current implementation uses curPos which may point to a token after the actual location where the semicolon was expected.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [For error type 'i' (missing semicolon), the error line should be the line of the last non-terminal before the expected semicolon, not the current token position. The current implementation uses curPos which may point to a token after the actual location where the semicolon was expected.]
